title: rubus × axillariflorus var. lugiacus
intro: Rubus × axillariflorus var. lugiacus, also known as Lug's blackberry or a blackberry thornless variant, is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × axillariflorus var. lugiacus include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
